medications: Melatonin 3 mg at bedtime as needed (sleep)
health.mental_health: Actively processing grief after the recent death of his mother; reports intrusive sadness, irritability, and trouble sleeping. Considering short-term grief counseling but feels conflicted about discussing family details.
recent_visits: Primary care follow-up for blood pressure and medication refill (2 weeks ago)
Sleep clinic check-in for CPAP compliance and mask fit (last month)
Urgent care visit for nighttime chest burning and reflux flare; ruled out cardiac cause (6 weeks ago)

finance.debt: Car payment and lingering credit card balance that increased after covering travel and funeral-related expenses; also fronted some costs while waiting for the estate to settle.
recent_transactions: Funeral home payment deposit and final balance
Round-trip flights Miami–Houston for family arrangements
Monthly CPAP supply replacement (mask cushions and filters)
Late fee on a credit card after missing a due date during the first weeks of grief

relationships: Older sister: Linh Nguyen (strained lately due to disagreements about their mother’s estate and memorial plans)
Partner: Daniel Rivera (supportive, but Rohan withdraws when overwhelmed)
Close friend: Marisol Vega (checks in regularly; encourages therapy and healthier routines)
Neighbor: Mrs. Evelyn Parker (occasionally helps by picking up packages when Rohan is away)
social.social_media_activity: Maintains a polished Instagram/Behance presence for design work; personal posts are rare. Recently posted a brief memorial story and then went quiet, limiting comments and muting notifications.
private_conversations: Disputes with his sister about executor decisions and distribution of personal items
Confiding in his partner about panic-like symptoms at night and fear of health decline
Discussing whether to attend a grief support group and concerns about privacy
Talking with family about selling his mother’s house and the emotional impact

schedule.work_hours: Typically 10:00 AM–6:30 PM weekdays, with occasional late-night crunch periods before deadlines; currently trying to avoid working past 9:00 PM due to sleep apnea and fatigue.
regular_appointments: Quarterly primary care blood pressure check
Biweekly virtual grief counseling consultation (trial period; evenings)
upcoming_events: Meeting with estate attorney in Coral Gables (next Tuesday morning)
Client brand review call with a Wynwood restaurant group (Friday 2:00 PM)
Memorial gathering with extended family (Saturday afternoon)
schedule.daily_routine: Wakes around 7:30 AM, checks blood pressure a few mornings per week, coffee (tries to keep it mild to avoid reflux), short walk when heat allows, design work blocks with frequent breaks, dinner at home, and a strict wind-down routine to improve sleep; grief waves disrupt focus and can shift the day.

professional.company: Independent studio operating under the name 'Rohan Nguyen Design' (sole proprietor) serving Miami-area hospitality and small tech startups
projects: Rebrand and menu design system for a Wynwood tapas bar (logo refresh, signage, social templates)
Pitch deck and UI mockups for a small Miami fintech startup seeking seed funding
Event poster series for a Little Haiti arts nonprofit (print and digital deliverables)
Packaging concept exploration for a local cold brew company
professional.performance_issues: Since the family death, he’s missed a couple of internal milestones and has had slower client response times; he’s quietly asked for one deadline extension and is worried about reputational damage if clients learn the details.
workplace_relationships: Relies on a freelance copywriter, Tessa Klein, for brand voice work (good rapport, but he’s been less communicative lately)
Print vendor contact at a Miami Lakes shop; relationship is friendly but time-sensitive when proofs are delayed
One recurring client (restaurant group) is demanding and expects rapid turnaround, increasing stress

hobbies: Beach walks early morning (South Pointe when it’s quieter)
Street photography in Wynwood and Little Havana
Home cooking with Vietnamese comfort dishes
Listening to design podcasts and ambient music while working
Occasional kayaking in Oleta River State Park
habits: Uses CPAP most nights but sometimes removes it during restless sleep
Drinks 1–2 coffees daily; avoids late caffeine due to reflux and sleep
Stress snacking at night when grief spikes (can worsen GERD)
Keeps a private notes app journal with voice memos to his late mother
Has a couple of drinks on difficult evenings, trying to cut back because it affects sleep and blood pressure
lifestyle.living_situation: Lives in a rented one-bedroom apartment in Miami with his partner; recently cleared out a small box of his mother’s belongings and keeps it in the closet, which can trigger grief unexpectedly.
lifestyle.dietary_preferences: Tries to manage GERD by limiting spicy foods, tomato-heavy meals, and late-night eating; aims for lighter dinners, more vegetables and lean proteins, but comfort foods and irregular meal timing increase during stressful weeks.
